case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. VS. JOHN PEREZ

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. SERVED AUG-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, JOHN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 66 GEARY STREET, ROOM #401, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, JOHN
